rationale: The current translation is excellent. It maintains Dan's direct and conversational tone while using precise technical terminology (e.g., '原子化 CSS' for utility-first). It correctly adjusted relative image paths in the frontmatter to account for the sub-directory structure. The previous suggestion regarding a broken link was actually incorrect; the current MDX already contains the correct absolute URL 'https://docs.astro.build/en/concepts/why-astro/'. No further fixes are required.

suggestionLog.match: [灵活性和优秀的架构主张之间取得了极佳的平衡](../docs.astro.build/en/concepts/why-astro/)
suggestionLog.replacement: [灵活性和优秀的架构主张之间取得了极佳的平衡](https://docs.astro.build/en/concepts/why-astro/)
suggestionLog.reason: The link was incorrectly changed to a relative path pointing to a non-existent local directory instead of the original external URL.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
